title: get index html success
description: Verify that a GET request to /index.html returns a 200 status code with the correct HTML content for the homepage.

title: get index html not found
description: Verify that a GET request to /index.html returns a 404 Not Found status code when the homepage resource is missing.

title: get index html internal server error
description: Verify that a GET request to /index.html returns a 500 Internal Server Error status code when the server encounters an error serving the homepage.

title: get privacy html success
description: Verify that a GET request to /privacy.html returns a 200 status code with the correct HTML content for the privacy policy page.

title: get privacy html not found
description: Verify that a GET request to /privacy.html returns a 404 Not Found status code when the privacy policy resource is missing.

title: get privacy html internal server error
description: Verify that a GET request to /privacy.html returns a 500 Internal Server Error status code when the server encounters an error serving the privacy policy page.
